en.title: Scholarship Tracker
en.summary: Freelance full-stack platform with a Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.2 backend microservice, PostgreSQL data modeling with Spring Data JPA, validation with Spring Validation, and automated CI/CD and infrastructure workflows using Docker, Terraform, and GitHub Actions.

en.title: Cloud-Native Full-Stack Developer | Personal Portfolio
en.summary: Cloud-native full-stack portfolio built with Infrastructure as Code using Terraform to automate the full resource lifecycle, S3 static hosting with CloudFront and HTTPS/TLS delivery, event-driven backend logic with AWS Lambda, and least-privilege IAM policies including Origin Access Control.

en.title: GopherCheck
en.summary: Lightweight Go-based CLI tool for monitoring website availability. It helps manage service endpoints and verify HTTP status codes directly from the terminal with fast health checks.

en.title: Puff&Chill
en.summary: Full-stack web application for purchasing outdoor movie tickets. Dynamic routes, reusable components, and deployment on Vercel.

en.title: GymLab
en.summary: Web application that analyzes training videos to estimate calories burned, count repetitions, and provide real-time technical feedback on form and performance.

en.title: AyDS - SongInfo
en.summary: Architecture analysis and refactoring of a Kotlin module using SOLID principles and persistence changes.

en.title: Hospitales2000
en.summary: Web app that allows patients to book appointments with different doctors by choosing from available schedules.

es.title: Scholarship Tracker
es.summary: Plataforma full-stack freelance con microservicio backend en Java 21 y Spring Boot 3.2, modelado de datos en PostgreSQL con Spring Data JPA, validaciones con Spring Validation y automatización de ciclo de vida e infraestructura con Docker, Terraform y GitHub Actions.

es.title: Cloud-Native Full-Stack Developer | Portfolio Personal
es.summary: Portfolio full-stack cloud-native con Infraestructura como Codigo usando Terraform para automatizar el ciclo de vida de recursos, hosting estatico en S3 con CloudFront y HTTPS/TLS, backend orientado a eventos con AWS Lambda y politicas IAM de minimo privilegio con Origin Access Control.

es.title: GopherCheck
es.summary: Herramienta CLI liviana en Go para monitorear disponibilidad de sitios web. Permite gestionar endpoints y verificar codigos de estado HTTP desde la terminal con chequeos de salud rapidos.

es.title: Puff&Chill
es.summary: Aplicación web full-stack para compra de entradas de cine al aire libre. Rutas dinámicas, componentes reutilizables y despliegue en Vercel.

es.title: GymLab
es.summary: Desarrollo de aplicación web que analiza videos de entrenamiento para estimar calorías quemadas, contar repeticiones y dar feedback técnico en tiempo real sobre la técnica y el rendimiento.

es.title: AyDS - SongInfo
es.summary: Análisis de arquitectura y refactorización de un módulo Kotlin con principios SOLID y cambios de persistencia.

es.title: Hospitales2000
es.summary: Aplicación web que permite a los pacientes reservar turnos con distintos médicos eligiendo entre los horarios disponibles
